title: cryptantha parviflora
intro: Cryptantha parviflora is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae), native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cryptantha parviflora include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a tincture or infusion, and sometimes used as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
